title: Add migration and repair for repos that already carry tracked changes state
summary: Provide deterministic migration for repos that already contain `.prism/state/changes/**`, including manifest/index repair, removal or archival of obsolete tracked change shards, and explicit continuity across the pre-removal and post-removal snapshot formats.

acceptance.label: Existing tracked repos can converge onto the new no-tracked-changes model without losing current semantic state
Migration explicitly preserves trust and publish continuity across the tracked-changes removal boundary
